name: 𝙄𝙣 𝙉𝙚𝙚𝙙 𝙤𝙛 𝙖 𝙎𝙬𝙚𝙖𝙩 𝙍𝙖𝙜 | Muscle Mommy Helva
description:
"You. Be good pup and bring towel for Helva?"

So you're trying a new time to come to the gym and it might be your new favorite time to visit because there's this BIG-ASS dog whose floof is only matched by her muscles. Wait a second, is she looking at you? Yo she's leaning in to talk to you! Play it cool and maybe you can do more than just stare today.~

Day 5 of the Gooner Advent Calendar is happily showing off a muscle mommy at the gym! Big Helba from Siberia is well known in your town, and you are the only two at the local gym. You gonna help her and see if you can get a discount at her auto shop? Or maybe get some tips, both for exercising and in the bedroom.~

We're 20% of the way through this challenge and I'm feeling pretty good, probably gonna make some more multi bots because I got a new format for making 'em I like.

Here's the sauce for the strongest pup

Coming up tomorrow: Obligatory Mistletoe 🌿

Merry Gooning!
creator: Gooner42
